evals.prompt: Preciso criar um sistema de gerenciamento de clínica veterinária. O backend deve ser em .NET com DDD e o frontend em React com TypeScript. As entidades principais são: Pet, Owner, Appointment, Veterinarian. Banco PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: Generates a complete backend scaffold with 4 entities following DDD/Clean Architecture patterns, plus a React frontend with feature pages for each entity, using PostgreSQL configuration.

assertions.text: Backend has 4 layers: Domain, Application, Infrastructure, API
Entities have factory methods and private setters (not anemic)
Commands and Queries are separated with proper MediatR handlers
Frontend has zero 'any' types in generated code
Routes use React.lazy() and Suspense for code splitting

evals.prompt: Tenho um projeto .NET existente que não segue DDD direito. Os controllers têm lógica de negócio, os models são anêmicos, não tem repository pattern. Analise e me diga o que precisa mudar.
evals.expected_output: Identifies architectural violations: anemic models, business logic in controllers, missing repository abstraction, no CQRS, no validation pipeline. Provides specific fix recommendations with code examples.

assertions.text: Identifies business logic in controllers as a violation
Recommends implementing Repository Pattern with interfaces in Domain
Provides concrete code examples for fixes, not just descriptions

evals.prompt: Create a fullstack e-commerce project. Name: ShopFlow. Entities: Product, Category, Order, OrderItem, Customer. Use SQL Server. Frontend with Tailwind CSS. I need the complete scaffold ready to build.
evals.expected_output: Runs both scaffold scripts to generate a complete backend and frontend project. Backend has all 5 entities with proper DDD structure. Frontend has pages for products, categories, orders, and customers.

assertions.text: All 5 entities (Product, Category, Order, OrderItem, Customer) have files generated
Application layer includes Result<T> pattern for error handling
Validation, Logging, and Performance pipeline behaviors are present
UI component library includes Button, Card, Input, Modal, Badge, Spinner
Route guards (ProtectedRoute, PublicRoute, RoleGuard) are present
